why_winner: Angle C opens by quoting a belief nearly every builder holds — "AI is getting cheaper" — then immediately pivots with "is half the story." That's a scroll-stopper that earns quote-tweets and civil disagreement. The close is the most screenshot-worthy line in the set: "Free tier is a pricing decision. Not a physics one." A strong take stated as fact invites replies without needing a question mark. No hard fails across any variant.

runner_up_notes.A: The "drank real water" opener is visceral — would work as a standalone viral tweet. C edges it out because the belief-then-pivot structure earns more engagement types (quote-tweet + reply vs. bookmark only).
runner_up_notes.B: "The kind people fight over" is the most emotionally loaded phrase in the set; C could borrow it, but C's concise structure is already its strength. B's authenticity score is the highest of three.
